LanguageData.Ammo_ChemicalCompoundOE_Cryo.label: Chemical munition OE (Cryo)
LanguageData.Ammo_ChemicalCompoundOE_Cryo.description: Stabilised chemical munition compound stored in special canister, for use in advanced chemical launchers.
LanguageData.Ammo_ChemicalCompoundOE_Napalm.label: Chemical munition OE (Napalm)
LanguageData.Ammo_ChemicalCompoundOE_Napalm.descripti: Stabilised chemical munition compound stored in special canister, for use in advanced chemical launchers.
LanguageData.Ammo_ChemicalCompoundOE_Aprometheum.desc: Stabilised chemical munition compound stored in special canister, for use in advanced chemical launchers.
LanguageData.Ammo_ChemicalCompoundOE_Thermobaric.desc: Stabilised chemical munition compound stored in special canister, for use in advanced chemical launchers.
LanguageData.Bullet_ChemicalCompoundOE_Cryo.label: Chemical munition OE (Cryo)
LanguageData.Bullet_ChemicalCompoundOE_Napalm.label: Chemical munition OE (Napalm)
